titleStmt.title: SII 26.431: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 431. (A.R. No. 410 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Vikramapāṇḍyadēva II: Year 6, Kaṉṉi (Puraṭṭāśi) śu. 1, Sunday, Hastam = 1274 A.D., September 2, f.d.n. ·53 f.d.t. ·04.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 1,000 kuḻi of land in Śiṟṟiṅgūr in Kuṟukkaikūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Irārāja-vaḷanāḍu, by the nagarattārs of the same place to provide for food-offerings at the waking up service and the Pulavar-talaivansandhi, in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagava-nāyaṉār of theplace. The land is stated to be a gift, probably from the king, to the nagarattārs called the Perumāḷ-kāṇi. It is stated that they made the gift as tax-free tirunā mattukkāṇi. The village of Marudūr is mentioned as forming a boundary of the gift land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komārapanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikramapāṇḍiyade vaṟku yāṇṭu
6 vatu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu prathamaiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattunāḷ
Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tirup pulippakava
nāyaṉāṟku Ivvūr nakarattārom Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku tiruppaḷḷieḻicci pulavar talaivaṉ canti Amu
tu ceytaruḷa Amutupaṭikkum paṭiveñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum viṭṭa nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷukku
perumāḷ kāṇiyāka prasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa Ivūril kūttāṇṭāḷ tiruttu Akaḻukku me
ṟku Iṉnāyaṉār tevatāṉam vākicantiruttukkum Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa puṉcai kuraṅku kuttikkum va
ṭakku Iṉnāyaṉār tevatāṉam marutūr Ellaikku kiḻakku Iṉnāyaṉār cey kaṇṇikkālukku teṟku
Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattuteṟkaṭaiya kiḻamel vaṟ vaṭṭa kuḻi 1000 Ikkuḻi Āyiramum
Iṉnāḷ mutal kār pacāṉam Uḷḷiṭṭa payirkaḷ Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa cantrāditatyavat ce
lvatāka tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭu kuṭuttom nakarattārom Itu panmā
heśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.431 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
